title: Cryptandra spathulata
taxonomy: Cryptandra spathulata is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae. It is native to Western Australia. Cryptandra spathulata is part of the genus Cryptandra, which consists of various species of shrubs and small trees. The plant is endemic to the southwestern region of Western Australia and is often found in heathlands and shrublands. Cryptandra spathulata is a relatively rare species and is of interest to botanists and conservationists.
